member.name: T:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Differentiation
member.summary: dy

member.name: T:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Checkpoints
member.summary: Increases performence by saving states that the backtracking derivative calculations can be performed between.

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Checkpoints.CalculateCheckpointGradients
member.summary: Perform derivative calculations for all elements in a tensor with input values from the derivatives of another tensor with the same shape

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Parallel.SIMDMatMul.Solve(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor,Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor)
member.summary: Matrix multiplication over the last two dimensions of two tensors

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Parallel.MultiplyScale.Scale(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor,System.Double)
member.summary: Scale all elements with a number

member.name: T:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Rev
member.summary: Data type for automatic differentiation with reverse mode accumulation.

member.name: F:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.sizes
member.summary: dimension size

member.name: P:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.Item(System.Int32[])
member.summary: Index parameter implementation

member.name: P:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: Index parameter implementation

member.name: P:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.Item(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Index parameter implementation

member.name: P:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.Item(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Index parameter implementation

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.#ctor(System.Int32[])
member.summary: Constructor

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.#ctor(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Copy constructor. Removes the derivatives and actions.

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.Transpose
member.summary: Transpose the last two dimensions

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.Scale(System.Double)
member.summary: Scale all elements with a number

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.Add(System.Double)
member.summary: Add a number to all elements

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.Pow(System.Double)
member.summary: Element-wise power

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.GenerateNormalRandomValues
member.summary: Generate normal random values with He scaling over the second last dimension of the tensor.

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.Softmax
member.summary: Softmax over last dimension

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.Mask
member.summary: Mask upper triangular part of the last two dimensions of a tensor

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.Dropout(System.Boolean[],System.Double)
member.summary: Zero out elemens of the last dimension of a tensor based on a masking array

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.ReLU
member.summary: Set all elements

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.Flatten
member.summary: Flatten last two dimensions.

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.GetMaxIndex
member.summary: Only used for final output layer

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.VecAdd(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor)
member.summary: Add a vector to the last dimension of the matrix

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.MatAdd(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor)
member.summary: In place element-wise addition of the elemens of two tensors with identical shape. Only used for optimizer.

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.ClearDerivatives
member.summary: Remove derivatives and derivative actions

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.GetDerivatives
member.summary: Extract derivatives of a tensor and return as a new tensor

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.TransferDerivatives(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor)
member.summary: Perform derivative calculations for all elements in a tensor with input values from the derivatives of another tensor with the same shape

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.MatAdd(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor,Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor)
member.summary: Element-wise addition of the elemens of two tensors with identical shape

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.MatDivElementWise(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor,Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor)
member.summary: Element-wise division of the elemens of two tensors with identical shape

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.MatMulElementWise(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor,Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor)
member.summary: Element-wise multiplication of the elemens of two tensors with identical shape

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.MatMul(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor,Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor)
member.summary: Matrix multiplication over the last two dimensions of two tensors

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.Concat(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor[])
member.summary: Concatenate an array of tensors of identical shape along its last dimension

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor.AddNorm(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor,Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.AutomaticDifferentiation.Tensor)
member.summary: Add two tensors and normalize over last dimension

member.name: T:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor
member.summary: 张量类 - GNN中所有数值计算的基础数据结构 支持多维数组的存储和基本数学运算

member.name: F:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor._Data
member.summary: 底层数据数组

member.name: F:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor._Shape
member.summary: 张量的形状（各维度大小）

member.name: F:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor._DimProds
member.summary: 维度乘积数组，用于快速计算多维索引 dimProds(i) = dims(0) * dims(1) * ... * dims(i-1)

member.name: F:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor._disposed
member.summary: 是否已释放资源

member.name: P:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Shape
member.summary: 张量的形状（各维度大小）

member.name: P:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Data
member.summary: 底层数据数组 Underlying data array
member.remarks: 存储张量数据的一维数组（行优先顺序）

member.name: P:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Rank
member.summary: 张量的维度数

member.name: P:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Length
member.summary: 张量中元素的总数

member.name: P:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.TotalLength
member.summary: 张量中元素的总数（兼容旧版本）

member.name: P:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Dimensions
member.summary: 张量的维度数组（兼容旧版本）

member.name: P:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.IsVariable
member.summary: 是否为变量（可训练） Whether this is a variable (trainable)

member.name: P:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Gradient
member.summary: 梯度（用于反向传播） Gradient for backpropagation

member.name: P:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Item(System.Int32)
member.summary: 获取或设置指定索引处的元素值（一维访问）

member.name: P:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Item(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 获取或设置指定位置处的元素值（二维访问）

member.name: P:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Item(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 获取或设置指定位置处的元素值（三维访问）
member.param: 第0维索引（通常对应行/高）
第1维索引（通常对应列/宽）
第2维索引（通常对应深度/通道）

member.name: P:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Item(System.Int32[])
member.summary: 获取或设置指定位置处的元素值（多维数组索引访问） 支持任意维度的索引访问

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.#ctor(System.Int32[])
member.summary: 创建指定形状的张量，并用零初始化

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.#ctor(System.Double[],System.Int32[])
member.summary: 使用指定数据创建张量

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.#ctor(System.Single[],System.Int32[])
member.summary: 使用指定数据创建张量（Single版本，兼容旧代码）

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.#ctor(System.Double[0:,0:])
member.summary: 从二维数组创建张量 Create tensor from 2D array

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.UpdateDimProds
member.summary: 更新维度乘积数组 用于快速计算多维索引到一维索引的转换

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Get1DInd(System.Int32[])
member.summary: 将多维索引转换为一维索引（来自旧版本）

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.MultAll(System.Int32[])
member.summary: 计算数组所有元素的乘积（来自旧版本）

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.DimsEqual(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor,Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor)
member.summary: 比较两个张量的维度是否相等（来自旧版本）
member.returns: 如果维度相等返回True，否则返回False

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.BroadcastedAddition(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor,Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor)
member.summary: 广播加法（来自旧版本） 当两个向量进行加法时，生成一个矩阵，其中每个元素是两个向量对应元素的和

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.From2DArray(System.Single[0:,0:])
member.summary: 从二维数组创建张量

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Filled(System.Int32[],System.Single)
member.summary: 创建填充指定值的张量

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Identity(System.Int32)
member.summary: 创建单位矩阵

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Random(System.Int32[],System.Single,System.Single,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: 创建随机张量（均匀分布）

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.RandomNormal(System.Int32[],System.Single,System.Single,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: 创建随机张量（正态分布，Xavier初始化） 用于神经网络权重初始化，有助于梯度流动

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Range(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 创建整数范围张量 Create integer range tensor

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.XavierInit(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Xavier初始化 - 适用于sigmoid/tanh激活函数

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.HeInit(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: He初始化 - 适用于ReLU激活函数

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Scalar(System.Double)
member.summary: 创建标量张量 Create scalar tensor

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Zeros(System.Int32[])
member.summary: 创建全零张量 Create zero tensor

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Ones(System.Int32[])
member.summary: 创建全一张量 Create ones tensor

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Clone
member.summary: 克隆张量 Clone tensor

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Reshape(System.Int32[])
member.summary: 重塑张量形状（来自旧版本） 改变张量的维度结构，但不改变数据
member.returns: 如果重塑成功返回True，否则返回False

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.GetValue(System.Int32[])
member.summary: 获取指定索引的值 Get value at specified indices

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.SetValue(System.Double,System.Int32[])
member.summary: 设置指定索引的值 Set value at specified indices

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Variable(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor)
member.summary: 创建变量张量 Create variable tensor

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.GetFlatIndex(System.Int32[])
member.summary: 将多维索引转换为扁平索引 Convert multi-dimensional indices to flat index

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.GetIndices(System.Int32)
member.summary: 将扁平索引转换为多维索引 Convert flat index to multi-dimensional indices

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.op_Addition(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor,Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor)
member.summary: 张量加法（逐元素）

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.op_Addition(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor,System.Single)
member.summary: 张量加标量（来自旧版本）

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.op_Subtraction(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor,Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor)
member.summary: 张量减法（逐元素）

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.op_Subtraction(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor,System.Single)
member.summary: 张量减标量（来自旧版本）

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.op_Multiply(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor,System.Single)
member.summary: 张量与标量相乘

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.op_Division(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor,System.Single)
member.summary: 张量与标量相除

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.op_Multiply(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor,Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor)
member.summary: 矩阵乘法运算符（来自旧版本） 两个二维张量进行矩阵乘法

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.ElementwiseMultiply(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor)
member.summary: 逐元素乘法（Hadamard积）

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.MatMul(Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor)
member.summary: 矩阵乘法（二维张量） 这是GNN消息传递的核心运算

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Transpose
member.summary: 转置

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Sum(System.Int32)
member.summary: 沿指定轴求和

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.TotalSum
member.summary: 计算所有元素的和

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Mean
member.summary: 计算所有元素的平均值

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Mean(System.Int32)
member.summary: 沿指定轴计算平均值

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.L2Norm
member.summary: 计算L2范数（欧几里得范数）

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Apply(System.Func{System.Single,System.Single})
member.summary: 对每个元素应用函数

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Apply(System.Func{System.Double,System.Double})
member.summary: 对每个元素应用函数（Double版本）

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.ToArray
member.summary: 获取原始数据数组的副本（Single版本）

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.ToDoubleArray
member.summary: 获取原始数据数组的副本（Double版本）

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.To2DArray
member.summary: 转换为二维数组

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.To2DArrayDouble
member.summary: 转换为二维数组（Double版本）

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.GetRow(System.Int32)
member.summary: 获取指定行

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.GetColumn(System.Int32)
member.summary: 获取指定列

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Print(System.String)
member.summary: 打印张量内容（用于调试）

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.ToString
member.summary: 转换为字符串表示 Convert to string representation

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Dispose
member.summary: 释放资源 Dispose resources

member.name: M:Microsoft.VisualBasic.MachineLearning.TensorFlow.Tensor.Finalize
member.summary: 析构函数
